response.justification: Bogdan has impressive technical depth, open-source contributions, and broad experience across languages and domains, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT architecture, UML modeling, and team management at an executive level, and his German proficiency is only basic — a critical requirement for this role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact, especially in GIS and tooling
Strong full-stack expertise across multiple languages and environments including Linux and Docker
Proven ability to lead technical projects independently and mentor through workshops and community efforts
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, falling short of the required C1 level
No clear evidence of formal IT architecture design, UML modeling, or client-facing technical advisory experience
Lacks documented experience managing or mentoring a team in a consulting or executive leadership context
